news.t: Thornburg Among First to Launch Actively Managed ETF Share Classes

holdings.infoBox: TAOZ is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.56%, Apple at 5.52%, Thornburg Capital Management at 5.52%, Colliers International Group at 3.79%, and Netflix at 3.72%.

overview.description: The Thornburg American Opportunities Fund (TAOZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of US large-cap stocks. The portfolio is categorized into basic value, consistent earners, and emerging franchises. TAOZ was launched on Apr 1, 2026 and is issued by Thornburg.

data.title: Thornburg Among First to Launch Actively Managed ETF Share Classes
data.text: American Opportunities and Focus Growth ETF share classes are now trading Expands investor access to Thornburg's actively managed strategies SANTA FE, N.M., April 1, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Thornburg Inv...
